title: Pixel Arcade Scene
summary: Retro 16-bit pixel art - neon arcade interior at night, glowing CRT screens, kids playing.
prompt: A nostalgic 16-bit pixel art illustration of a 1990s arcade interior at night. Rows of cabinet arcade machines glowing with neon CRT screens (one showing a fighting game, one a racing game), checkered carpet floor, hanging neon signs in pink and cyan, a few pixel-art kids playing with joysticks, a vending machine in the back corner. Crunchy detailed pixel work in the style of a SNES JRPG town scene - bold palette, no anti-aliasing. Wide 16:9 composition.
